categories.title: Final delivered status is not confirmed
categories.reason: The authoritative header is not in the only normal fulfilled state accepted by the importer (StatusID 2 and DeliveryStatus 507).
categories.requiredEvidence: A corrected authoritative order header proving the order reached final delivered status, or a separate migration policy for non-fulfilled orders.

categories.title: Refund activity exists
categories.reason: The refund report identifies the order. Importing it as an ordinary fulfilled sale would overstate sales and lose the refund history.
categories.requiredEvidence: A refund-aware migration design with authoritative item, refund amount, timestamp, and final-state evidence.

categories.title: Item prices and quantities do not reconcile to the subtotal
categories.reason: The reconstructed sum of item price multiplied by quantity differs from the authoritative order subtotal.
categories.requiredEvidence: Corrected line-level quantity and unit-price evidence that reconciles exactly to the order subtotal.

categories.title: A trustworthy item price cannot be resolved
categories.reason: Available reports conflict or do not contain enough evidence to select an exact unit price without guessing.
categories.requiredEvidence: A consistent authoritative unit price for every item line, with totals that reconcile to the header.

categories.title: Previously known order is omitted from both updated order and sales exports
categories.reason: The legacy ID existed in the earlier reports but disappeared from the updated authoritative order and sales data.
categories.requiredEvidence: A synchronized export containing the authoritative header and item lines for the missing legacy ID.

categories.title: Sales lines exist but the authoritative order header is missing
categories.reason: The sales export contains the legacy ID, but the updated order export has no matching header with final status, totals, refund state, and timestamps.
categories.requiredEvidence: The original authoritative order header matching the existing sales lines.

categories.title: Order contains zero-quantity item lines
categories.reason: The reports otherwise reconcile, but importing a zero-quantity order line would create a misleading order record.
categories.requiredEvidence: A corrected line export with positive quantities, or explicit approval and a documented rule to remove zero-quantity artifacts before import.

categories.title: Authoritative header has no item lines
categories.reason: The order header exists, but no matching item detail is available to construct the order.
categories.requiredEvidence: The complete line-level sales report for the legacy order.

laterSummaryOnlyActivity.reason: These product-summary rows have no legacy order ID and no authoritative order header or complete order-level totals. A location/user/date/status grouping is not guaranteed to represent one order.

conclusion: No ID in this report is safe to import as a normal fulfilled K-Electric order using the current evidence.
